matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Father > Day 1 > Lunch > Mediterranean Lentil & Feta Salad

node.name: Mediterranean Lentil & Feta Salad
node.short_description: A hearty salad of green lentils tossed with sun-dried tomatoes, feta, arugula, and a bright lemon-herb vinaigrette — plant-powered and filling.
node.meal_suggestion: Cook green lentils until tender but not mushy; drain and cool slightly. Toss with chopped sun-dried tomatoes, crumbled feta, baby arugula, diced cucumber, and fresh dill. Dress with a vinaigrette of olive oil, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, and minced garlic. Serve at room temperature; keeps well for meal prep.
node.nutrition_note: Lentils are an excellent source of plant-based protein, fiber, iron, and folate; sun-dried tomatoes concentrate lycopene and add umami; feta provides calcium and tangy flavor; arugula offers vitamins A, C, and K. Olive oil and lemon create a heart-healthy dressing. High in fiber for digestive health and blood sugar management.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Father > Day 5 > Lunch > Grilled Cheese & Soup — Classic Skillet

node.name: Grilled Cheese & Soup — Classic Skillet
node.short_description: Classic skillet grilled cheese on whole-grain bread with cheddar, tomato soup, and grapes.
node.meal_suggestion: Consider adding a side salad or steamed vegetables to boost veggie intake; use a smaller slice of cheddar or a lower-fat cheese to reduce saturated fat; choose a low-sodium tomato soup to help manage sodium.
node.nutrition_note: Provides protein from cheddar and fiber from whole-grain bread, plus antioxidants from grapes. Tomato soup adds volume but can be high in sodium; opt for low-sodium soup and moderate cheese portions for a balanced meal.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Father > Day 6 > Lunch > Turkey Sandwich — Mild-Spice Combo

node.name: Turkey Sandwich — Mild-Spice Combo
node.short_description: A mild-spice turkey sandwich on whole-grain bread with lettuce, tomato, and mustard.
node.meal_suggestion: Keep as a simple, balanced lunch: turkey sandwich on whole-grain bread with lettuce and tomato. Pair with fruit or carrot sticks for more fiber. To adjust spice, use a milder mustard or add a small amount of hot sauce if acceptable.
node.nutrition_note: Lean turkey provides protein; whole-grain bread adds fiber; lettuce and tomato supply vitamins. Moderate sodium from deli turkey and mustard; consider low-sodium options if needed. Contains gluten (bread).

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Father > Day 3 > Lunch > Hummus Snack Plate — Citrus Fresh Style

node.name: Hummus Snack Plate — Citrus Fresh Style
node.short_description: Colorful Mediterranean-inspired snack plate featuring hummus, whole-wheat pita, veggies, and a cheese component for protein, fiber, and healthy fats.
node.meal_suggestion: As a Citrus Fresh-style snack: assemble with 2–3 tablespoons hummus, 1 small whole-wheat pita cut into wedges, cucumber slices, cherry tomatoes, and a small cheese wedge. Add a squeeze of lemon or citrus zest to brighten the flavors. If dairy-free, omit cheese or substitute with a plant-based option.
node.nutrition_note: This plate provides protein from hummus and cheese, plus fiber from whole-wheat pita and vegetables, and healthy fats from tahini in hummus. It offers a balanced mix of complex carbs, protein, and fats. Watch sodium from store-bought hummus and cheese; consider reduced-sodium options or smaller portions if needed. For a lighter version, you can reduce cheese or use part-skim options.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Father > Day 7 > Lunch > Caprese Sandwich — Mild-Spice Bowl

node.name: Caprese Sandwich — Mild-Spice Bowl
node.short_description: Caprese-inspired sandwich with whole-grain bread, mozzarella, tomato, basil, and balsamic for a mild, fresh flavor.
node.meal_suggestion: For a bowl version, serve components over greens or quinoa and drizzle with balsamic. To boost protein, add grilled chicken or chickpeas. Pair with fruit or veggie side to round out the meal and keep portions mindful of sodium.
node.nutrition_note: Fiber from whole-grain bread plus protein and calcium from mozzarella; tomatoes and basil add vitamins. Balsamic adds flavor with modest sugar; watch sodium from cheese. Mild, vegetarian option.
